name: buildboard
description: Kanban task board with GitHub Copilot integration — plan, send, automate, and track your AI-assisted workflow

commands.title: Build Board: Export Session as Markdown

buildboard.autoPromptSession.description: Prompt to start a new session when VSCode opens

buildboard.carryOverTasks.description: Carry over unfinished tasks to the next session

buildboard.automationAutoApproveThreshol.description: Minimum AI confidence percentage (0-100) to auto-approve a task without requiring manual review. Set to 100 to always require manual approval.

buildboard.automationNoActivityTimeout.description: Seconds to wait for file changes after sending a task to Copilot. If no workspace edits are detected within this period, the task is auto-approved (at 0% threshold) or checkpointed for review.

buildboard.autoBackup.description: Automatically back up data in the background

buildboard.autoBackupMaxCount.description: Maximum number of auto-backup files to keep. Oldest backups are deleted when the limit is exceeded.

buildboard.autoBackupIntervalMin.description: Minutes between automatic backups (1-60). Backups only occur when data has changed.

buildboard.storageScope.description: Where to store Build Board data. 'global' shares data across all workspaces. 'workspace' stores data in .buildboard/ inside the current workspace folder.
